issues.description: First effect has wrong trigger. Card type is 'Event' with [Main] timing, should not use 'OnPlay' trigger. Events with [Main] timing use 'Activated' trigger.

Second effect in official text is missing from DSL. The text says 'Then, up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 power or less cannot activate [Blocker] during this turn.' This should be an action that removes the Blocker keyword, not a KO effect.
Second effect (Trigger effect) does not exist in the official text. The card has no [Trigger] effect, only a [Main] effect with two sequential actions.
